special_mechanics.name: Spear Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Player can summon and use a spear as a weapon. Unused sprite frames for summoning animation exist in ROM.

special_mechanics.name: Bird Companion
special_mechanics.description: Player can obtain a bird companion via debug commands

special_mechanics.name: Red Condor Control
special_mechanics.description: Sharaku can control a Red Condor weapon using the phrase from three-eyed script

tier_notes: Tier 2: No empirical movement data extracted from available sources. Sources contain debug menu information, test mode details, and narrative content from manga/anime adaptation, but no quantified physics parameters, speed values, or jump mechanics.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Mitsume ga Tooru NES article)
